title: Baroque Works Moves in Secret
description: On pages 21–23, this part focuses on baroque works moves in secret, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Baroque Works Moves in Secret. Vivi and the Straw Hats decide that stopping the war means confronting Crocodile directly instead of chasing the rebels blindly. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We cannot allow VIVI's Determina- Tion and IGARAM'S sacrifice go to waste!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: attack crocodile at Rainbase Immedi- Ately!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Please hold on a moment, your majesty! It's quite the distance from here to Rainbase.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Crocodile will easily know we're coming and should he wish to, he can simply avoid a fight.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Moreover, Crocedile has the support of the people behind him!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Even moreso than your majesty right now, I'm afraid!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If we move in to attack Crocodile now,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That would be pouring oil on fire!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The rebels will no doubt use the opportunity to capture the Royal Palace,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: While our armies attack Rainbase...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So what if the rebels take the palace...!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Haven't I told you already that the country is its people!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Even if the Royal Army were to be defeated, as long as crocodile is taken out, the country will be rebuilt by the hands of its people!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But if we instead have our army fight the Rebel Forces,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The only one laughing at the end will be crocodile!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Your majesty...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Forgive our short- sightedness...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It does not matter even if stopping the rebels is impossible... Our only target is Crocodile!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Our enemy is a member of the Royal Shichibukai...! This will be no easy battle...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It won't be one that can be wow without sacrifices!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Chaka! Call all officers for an emergency battle meeting!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Pell, you are to go ahead and scout the enemy base.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We've underestimated our majesty's foresight... What sheer force of will!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: First thing tomorrow morning,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Send all troops to Rainbase!

summary: This part develops baroque works moves in secret and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
